title: OHP AND TRIMET HONORED CITIZEN ENROLLMENT - 211info
text: SLAVIC COMMUNITY CENTER OF NW OHP AND TRIMET HONORED CITIZEN ENROLLMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Assists with enrollment in Oregon Health Plan (OHP) and TriMet Honored Citizen pass. Eligibility: Individuals who identify as part of the Slavic Community Hours: Wednesday 10am-2pm by appointment only Email (503) 272-1470 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 272-1470 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Photo ID, proof of income, proof of address LANGUAGES: English, Russian, Ukrainian, Romanian AREA SERVED: Tri-Met Honored Passes: Clackamas, Columbia, Multnomah, and Washintgon Counties OHP enrollment: State of Oregon SITE HOURS: Wednesday 10am-2pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus line FX2 Services: Benefits and Services Assistance * Slavic Community Medicaid Information/Counseling * Slavic Community If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. No Mapping Information Available
